'''Calian fliers''' were small atmospheric craft in the [[Calian Fleet]].

==Characteristics==
Each vessel was equipped with two [[energy cannon]]s. Numerous such vessels were carried aboard a [[Calian aerial battleship]].

==History==
[[Aron Peacebringer]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] took such a ship from [[Sk'ar's hidden base]] to attack the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] general's battleship. Despite Leia's excellent piloting, the little ship was shot down, but not before Aron and Leia jumped aboard the battleship.

[[Bentilais san Sk'ar|Sk'ar]] later attempted to flee his battleship aboard another flier, but [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] threw a metallic gun mount which destroyed the craft.

==Appearances==
